steps.title: Expand both sides
steps.content:
Distribute on each side of the equation:
$$
5(12x-18)=60x-90
$$
$$
-15(6-4x)=-90+60x
$$

steps.title: Compare the expressions
steps.content: Both sides simplify to the same expression: $$ 60x-90=60x-90 $$ This identity is true for every value of $x$, so the equation has infinitely many solutions. The answer is C.
